name: St Andrews Beach Golf Course
summary: The Peninsula's defining public-access course, St Andrews Beach pairs Tom Doak architecture with genuine world-ranking credibility and a windswept links feel you can actually book.
description: St Andrews Beach is the strongest public-access golf story on the Mornington Peninsula. It is serious architecture without private-club theatre, a course golfers travel for and non-golfers can still understand once you explain what makes it special.
heroAlt: Coastal landscape near Cape Schanck on the Mornington Peninsula
highlights: World top-100 recognition in recent global rankings
Strong fit for a one-night or two-night golf weekend

rankings: World Top 100 course in recent global rankings, year-sensitive verify before publish
